creator: christophe.pedretti@netcourrier.com
text:
It seems that the error message /kernel: couldn't m_pullup
is not related to my issue.

Instead, the system hangs with no message.

I can do a ping -s anyPacketSize IPFromLocalNetwork
with no problem; the problem appears only when i ping
an internet host with a pack size greater or equal to 1465
(ADSL with a PPPoE connection through ppp)

The ethernet adapter is a Xircom CEM56.

---
Christophe
